name: evidence-seeker-platform
description: Evidence Seeker Platform - A modern full-stack application for AI fact-checking

scripts.setup:backend: npm run db:reset && cd backend && uv venv && source .venv/bin/activate && uv pip install -e .[dev] && cp .env.dev .env && rm -rf uploads && mkdir -p uploads && alembic upgrade head && python init_db.py
scripts.db:reset: docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down -v && docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d db
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && source .venv/bin/activate && alembic upgrade head
scripts.backend:install: cd backend && source .venv/bin/activate && uv pip install -e .[dev]
scripts.lint: cd backend && source .venv/bin/activate && black --check . && ruff check . && mypy .
scripts.clean: docker-compose down -v && rm -rf backend/.venv frontend/node_modules frontend/dist

author: Evidence Seeker Team
